{{Quote|Mesa will bring back many fine animals for the Munchen.|Boss Gallo|<ref name="GB" />}}
The '''Sacred Feast''' or '''Great Feast''', sometimes referred to as the "'''Munchen'''," was a special [[Standard day/Legends|day]] of celebration and thanks for the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] to their [[Gud/Legends|guds]], the [[Deity/Legends|deities]] of Gungan religion.<ref name="GB" /> Tradition dictated that the [[Boss/Legends|Boss]], or leader, of each [[City/Legends|village]] venture into the [[Tree/Legends|forest]] once a [[Standard year/Legends|year]] and hunt enough animals to feed all the villagers.<ref name="Prima" /> One certain Sacred Feast took place around the year [[3000 BBY]].<ref name="EA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the [[War of the Gungan tribes|war]] depicted in ''Galactic Battlegrounds'' at this time.</ref> During the event, Boss [[Gallo/Legends|Gallo]] left his village of [[Otoh Sancture]] to search for [[Nerf/Legends|nerfs]] to prepare for the Sacred Feast. However, as he came upon some nerfs, his village was [[Destruction of Otoh Sancture|attacked]] and destroyed by [[Bursa/Legends|bursas]], furry carnivorous semi-[[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] creatures, later found out to be sent by Boss [[Rogoe/Legends|Rogoe]].<ref name="GB" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Sacred Feast made its only appearances in the [[2001]] [[Wikipedia:Personal computer|PC]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''<ref name="GB" /> and its expansion pack [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|''Clone Campaigns'']]. It appeared in the first mission of the Boss [[Rugor Nass/Legends|Nass]] campaign titled "Otoh Sancture."<ref name="CC">''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''</ref> The Feast also received a mention in the [[Prima Games|Prima]] [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|strategy guide]] for the game, released a week prior.<ref name="Prima" />
